description_long: This is a modern, low-profile sofa upholstered in a matte blue fabric, featuring a deep seat and wide, blocky armrests. The sofa is adorned with two large, loose cushions placed asymmetrically on the seat and backrest, adding a casual and inviting appearance. The armrests are thick and straight, matching the overall boxy silhouette of the sofa, and rise to just below the height of the backrest. The backrest is continuous and low, providing a sleek, contemporary look without any visible tufting or decorative stitching. The base of the sofa is solid and extends to the floor, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and monolithic presence. The upholstery appears smooth and uniform, with subtle seams running along the edges for a clean finish.
description: A modern, low-profile blue sofa with wide armrests, a continuous low backrest, and two large, loose cushions. The upholstery is smooth and matte, with a solid base and no visible legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, straight armrest and the layered arrangement of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide seat, two large loose cushions, and the symmetrical, blocky armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the continuous, low backrest and the solid, uninterrupted base.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose cushions placed asymmetrically on the seat and backrest; cushions are uniform in size and not attached.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight, block-style armrests at seat height, fully padded and integrated into the sofa's silhouette with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is a solid plinth extending to the floor, giving a grounded appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, low backrest with a straight profile and no visible segmentation or tufting; backrest is integrated with the sofa body.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and subtle seam lines; no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
